intro: Ebenus buxifolia, also known as box-leaved hawthorn, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to provide various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as improving cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Ebenus buxifolia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
